articles.author: Ryan Whitwam
articles.title: Google finally releases a Finance Android app, promises iOS version later in 2026 - Ars Technica
articles.description: It took 20 years, but the Finance app arrives just in time to be packed full of AI.

articles.author: Steve Kopack
articles.title: Apple shares plunge after it hikes prices on iPads and laptops - NBC News
articles.description: Apple shares fell sharply after the tech giant raised prices on iPads and MacBooks, saying the AI boom is driving up the cost of memory.
articles.content:
Apple shares fell sharply Thursday after the tech giant raised prices on a number of its signature products to make up for what it said were skyrocketing memory prices resulting from the AI boom.
